name: @clearline/data-access-payments
description: Payments data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over /api/payments/* (context, create with client-generated Idempotency-Key + 30s timeout + full-jitter 5xx retry, intent polling, FX quote). Surfaces the server's validation/idempotency 4xx as typed errors (US-CW-007/008/009). No UI, no business rules — those live in libs/ui and libs/domain/payments.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-004 (US-CW-007 Vendor Payment Submission & Idempotency, US-CW-008 Validation/Limits/Recipient Checks, US-CW-009 Compliance Holds, Reversals & Status).
